title: Freeze the first apprentice role
objective: Narrow the first apprentice to one job that can actually be scored honestly. Produce a canonical role manifest under seed/ with the exact role name 'Frontend/Product Engineer', allowed and blocked surfaces, and a validation test.
context: The repo currently has a broader 'Software Engineer Apprentice' framing. Spec 014 freezes the first role to a Frontend/Product Engineer that works only on judge-facing product slices. The role manifest is the single source of truth.
pass_threshold: One canonical role manifest exists; the role name is exactly 'Frontend/Product Engineer'; 100% of seed tasks reference that same role id; the blocked-surface list explicitly excludes partner integrations, wallet/chain work, and unrelated infra.
failure_interpretation: The apprentice is still doing multiple jobs at once, so scores will drift and promotion decisions will be fake-comparable.
